title: Lesson 231
transcript: As part of asset security and how we protect assets, it's really important to have really good handling requirements because as we said before, people are accountable, that would be the owners, but then everyone else is going to be responsible for protecting those assets. while those assets are in their possession or in their custody. But for people to be able to take care of that responsibility for protecting assets, they need to know how to handle those assets and how to do certain things that become requirements of protecting those assets as they go through their life cycle for example so handling requirement and procedures that are part of that are going to be really important parts of what security and the security function supports in the organization related to asset security. So for example, media handling because you could have information and assets that are stored on different types of media that media the different type of media may require different handling requirements and you want those to be as clear as possible so that people can just follow those procedures. And so part of what we need here to protect assets are handling requirements. We may also need, for example, storage requirements for, again, whether we have custodians or owners that are storing certain assets on certain type of media may require different procedures, different handling requirements. Those need to be spelled out pretty effectively so that people can follow them as procedures. And same thing with media retention and what happens at the end of that retention period, which is what we call defensible destruction. For people to be able to do that properly based on the value of that asset, we need specific procedures so that they know how to do it properly. So for example, if you have a hard drive, that contains information that needs to be securely destroyed may require us to take out that hard drive and actually shred it, for example. But people are only going to be able to do that if there are clear handling procedures on how to actually do that. So those need to be procedures that are very effectively written and people know how to execute as procedures related to asset protection.
